title: Burden of Proof for Insanity
text: The party claiming that any person, including himself, is or was insane has the burden of proof on that issue.

structure.division_title: Burden of Proof; Burden of Producing Evidence; Presumptions and Inferences
structure.article_title: Burden of Proof on Specific Issues

notes: Allocates the burden of proof to the party asserting insanity.
